textByHash.0302a5c365608c199823f273f55b8418c1e8aae0: How're we supposed to score some free grog at the bar when we got no stories to be tellin'!
textByHash.09efa3bd6c8ea3e3d4833c19b4c4ea00093937af: Well, it means I be the winner!
textByHash.20e96f123fcaee001765824335b74d60a1f3c66a: Well, I guess I be lookin' fer a new opportunity.
textByHash.379a6adedf9ff2d04e6b2f7addd346527cb0529c: There's been a worrying lack o' sinkin' lately, Cap'n. Worried it's affectin' the crew's morale.
textByHash.4a058cf4a967c989bb352a0ec50864d90c4f47ca: Finally, the Cap'n sank the Snake Eyes sailin' north out o' Catherby.
textByHash.5500d16a02dbeb25c7c405e79511b3ed66ae2506: Aye! I be the last o' me crew! Not even our ship left now!
textByHash.5aa9bdda6d82c7949e1a05190776cc16ee51bca4: Aye, they be mighty good, but I'm still lookin' fer a new opportunity.
textByHash.5d0c224be615c61433fc3550ba50da06fb0ffdbc: It be a series o' bad luck! First, Bill, the lookout, collided with an albatross in the crows nest 'n took a tumble overboard.
textByHash.cf306cf3582fed258f4903bc06a35de243d1b0d0: Aye, I'm ready to take another roll o' the dice!
textByHash.ec186659cac2cc0a2053369e6aea1433ce820988: Then the ship's cook got squashed by a crate o' hard tack. Salty Robbie took a drunken nap in the bilge water 'bout the same time.
textByHash.ee7dff949a80336ef99dda473efa055a2c751a73: Hmm... Nay, me hearty. I be thinkin' ye'd be the end o' me lucky streak.
textByHash.fb447de30bbfacfe3c45bd8f2579e5064148874f: Well, ye' know where t' find me when ye' are.
